body.jobTitle: Full stack and Web app developer
body.description:
Full-Stack Web & Mobile Developer (Contract – 12 Weeks)

Project Length: 12 weeks
Start: Immediate
Type: Contract / Project-Based
Tech Stack: React, JavaScript (web app first; mobile experience required)

Project Overview

We are building a production-ready web application with a clear scope, defined requirements, and a fixed 12-week delivery timeline. Figma designs, requirements, and use cases are already prepared. This is an execution role, not an exploratory or learning project.

You will be responsible for building, integrating, and shipping a functional web app, with consideration for mobile responsiveness and future mobile extension.

Responsibilities

Build and ship a complete web application using React

Develop and integrate front-end and back-end functionality

Translate Figma designs into clean, responsive UI

Implement APIs, data handling, and core business logic

Ensure performance, security, and scalability best practices

Collaborate with a project manager and front-end/back-end contributors

Deliver milestones on a strict 12-week timeline

Participate in code reviews and maintain clean, documented code

Required Experience

Proven experience as a Full-Stack Developer

Strong hands-on experience with React

Demonstrated experience building production web applications

Solid understanding of JavaScript, REST APIs, and modern web architecture

Experience building mobile-responsive applications

Ability to work from defined requirements without excessive hand-holding

Strong communication and deadline discipline

Nice to Have

Experience with mobile frameworks or web-to-mobile adaptation

Experience shipping MVPs or startup products

Familiarity with Agile or sprint-based delivery

Experience working on fixed-timeline projects

Deliverables

Fully functional web application delivered within 12 weeks

Clean, maintainable, documented codebase

Deployed application ready for real users

How to Apply

Please include:

Links to live web apps or shipped products (required)

Your role in each project

Your availability for the full 12-week timeline

Confirmation of React and full-stack experience

Applications without real project examples will not be considered.

feedbackToClient.comment: Good client and I will definitely work again!
